name: Tanioka's Seafoods
tagline: West-side pilgrimage spot — the smoked meat counter alone is worth the drive from town.
mustOrder: ahi patties ($3–4 each, crispy outside, tender inside — tourists overlook these)
talkStory: Multi-generational family business rooted in Waipahu's plantation community — 'Grandma Tanioka's' recipes are the foundation. You can taste before buying a pound. Bring a cooler for the drive home. Great party platters for local gatherings. Best selection before 1pm.
